clusters.title: Military air strikes kill dozens of people in northeast Nigeria, Amnesty International says
clusters.neutral_headline: Military Air Strikes Kill Dozens in Nigeria

items.title: Military air strikes kill dozens of people in northeast Nigeria, Amnesty International says
items.standfirst: Military air strikes on a village in northeastern Nigeria killed dozens of people on Saturday, Amnesty International reported Sunday. The country's air force initially said it had struck a "known terrorist enclave and logistics hub" before later saying it was launching an investigation into the attack following reports of civilian casualties.
items.content: Military air strikes on a village in northeastern Nigeria killed dozens of people on Saturday, Amnesty International reported Sunday. The country's air force initially said it had struck a "known terrorist enclave and logistics hub" before later saying it was launching an investigation into the attack following reports of civilian casualties.

items.title: Dozens feared dead in air strike on village in northeastern Nigeria

items.title: At least 25 killed in stampede at popular historic fortress in Haiti
items.standfirst: The incident took place at the Citadelle Henri, also known as Citadelle Laferriere, a 19th-century fortress and tourist spot in the northern town of Milot.
items.content: The incident took place at the Citadelle Henri, also known as Citadelle Laferriere, a 19th-century fortress and tourist spot in the northern town of Milot.

items.title: At least 30 dead in stampede at Haiti’s historic Citadelle Laferriere
items.standfirst: The fortress was packed before the annual celebration at the UNESCO World Heritage Site, authorities say.
items.content: The fortress was packed before the annual celebration at the UNESCO World Heritage Site, authorities say.

items.title: At least 30 killed in crush at historic fortress in Haiti
items.standfirst: Officials said many killed at popular tourist site were young, with more people reported injured or missingAt least 30 people, many of them young, have died and dozens more are reported to have been injured after a crush at a mountaintop fortress in northern Haiti that is a popular tourist spot.Jean Henri Petit, the head of civil protection for the country’s Nord department, said the incident took place on Saturday at Citadelle Henry, also known as Citadelle Laferrière, a large 19th-century fortress built shortly after the Caribbean country’s independence from France. Continue reading...
items.content: Officials said many killed at popular tourist site were young, with more people reported injured or missingAt least 30 people, many of them young, have died and dozens more are reported to have been injured after a crush at a mountaintop fortress in northern Haiti that is a popular tourist spot.Jean Henri Petit, the head of civil protection for the country’s Nord department, said the incident took place on Saturday at Citadelle Henry, also known as Citadelle Laferrière, a large 19th-century fortress built shortly after the Caribbean country’s independence from France. Continue reading...

items.title: China unveils measures to improve ties with Taiwan after visit by opposition leader

items.title: China Unveils Taiwan Goodwill Steps After Opposition Talks
